inputs.name: Scale parameters
inputs.description: Control how many process executions and files are created

num_processes.name: Number of processes
num_processes.description: How many GENERATE_FILES instances to run in parallel

curated_outputs_per_process.name: Curated outputs per process
curated_outputs_per_process.description: Declared outputs named in this schema (captured as curated execution output)

process_outputs_per_process.name: Process outputs per process
process_outputs_per_process.description: Declared outputs NOT named in this schema (captured per-process but not curated)

scratch_files_per_process.name: Scratch files per process
scratch_files_per_process.description: Files created in the work dir but not declared as outputs; purged by Flow

enable_aggregator.name: Enable aggregator
enable_aggregator.description: When true, adds a downstream AGGREGATE process that consumes the curated outputs

filename_padding_chars.name: Filename padding chars
filename_padding_chars.description: Extra characters appended to each declared-output filename; inflates path length so Flow's batch_file_metadata rendered script grows faster. Useful for triggering ARG_MAX overflow with fewer processes.

outputs.name: Curated files
outputs.description: Small text files from each generator process

outputs.name: Aggregate summary
outputs.description: Summary listing of all curated files (only produced when the aggregator is enabled)
